strengths: The agent demonstrated excellent policy compliance, adhering to all banking policies and procedures.
The agent provided clear and concise communication, ensuring the customer understood the solution and next steps.
The agent showed empathy and professionalism throughout the call, creating a positive customer experience.
improvements: Consider providing more proactive solutions to prevent similar issues in the future.
In the event of a transfer issue, ensure that the customer is aware of the estimated timeframe for resolution.
When explaining the process, consider using simpler language to ensure the customer fully understands the solution.

rephrasing.original: The receiving bank will contact you within 24-48 hours.
rephrasing.better: We'll work with the receiving bank to ensure they receive the funds as soon as possible. You can expect to hear from them within the next 24-48 hours, and we'll follow up to confirm everything is resolved to your satisfaction.
